title: The Biomes We've Gone  waystones compat
description: This mod adds waystones to BWG's villages and ensures that the red_rock, salem, and skyris structures will normally spawn iron golems upon generation. Previously, they would not spawn in these structures.
body: This mod adds waystones to BWG's villages and ensures that the red_rock, salem, and skyris structures will normally spawn iron golems upon generation. Previously, they would not spawn in these structures.
